inputs.label: Document Value
inputs.businessContext: The monetary value of the contract or transaction document.

businessContext_i18n.en: The monetary value of the contract or transaction document.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sözleşme veya işlem belgesinin parasal değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Geldwert des Vertrags oder der Transaktionsurkunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur monétaire du contrat ou du document de transaction.

inputs.label: Stamp Duty Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable stamp duty percentage based on jurisdiction and document type.

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable stamp duty percentage based on jurisdiction and document type.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yargı yetkisi ve belge türüne göre uygulanabilir damga vergisi yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anwendbarer Stempelsteuersatz basierend auf Rechtsordnung und Dokumententyp.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de droit de timbre applicable selon la juridiction et le type de document.

inputs.label: Fixed Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed administrative fee for stamping, if any.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed administrative fee for stamping, if any.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa, damgalama için sabit idari ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Verwaltungsgebühr für die Stempelung, falls vorhanden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais administratifs fixes de timbre, le cas échéant.

inputs.label: Exemption Threshold
inputs.businessContext: Minimum document value below which no stamp duty applies.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum document value below which no stamp duty applies.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Altında damga vergisi uygulanmayan minimum belge değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mindestdokumentwert, unter dem keine Stempelsteuer anfällt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur minimale du document en dessous de laquelle aucun droit de timbre ne s'applique.

inputs.label: Number of Stamps
inputs.businessContext: Number of stamping instances for bulk calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of stamping instances for bulk calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplu hesaplamalar için damgalama örneği sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'instances de timbre pour les calculs en vrac.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
